title: USGS Volcano Hazards Program
description: A USGS source card about volcano monitoring, hazards, eruptions, and risk communication.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS Volcano Hazards Program resources explain eruption hazards, monitoring instruments, alerts, observatories, maps, and how scientists communicate risk.
Use this source for students comparing evidence types: seismic data, gas measurements, satellite images, ground deformation, and field observations.
USGS materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some linked media may have separate credit or rights requirements. Check item-level rights.
